# ✍️ Add Templated Document Generator

It would be useful to provide a small utility that can assemble a formatted document (e.g. a cover letter) from a pool of predefined text snippets.

Instead of manually editing the same file over and over, the tool would:

- Ask the user for some basic information (name, company, position).
- Choose from a list of opening/closing paragraphs and other sections.
- Insert the answers into placeholders and stitch everything together.

The document could later be exported to PDF or stored in a central location.

----- COMMENTS -----
This would help automating repetitive communication tasks (letters, certificates, etc.) for the school.
